name: Plinth Object Riser

product_dna.core_purpose: Elevate a small perfume, jewelry, mineral, or keepsake for display.
product_dna.design_philosophy: A low stepped plinth creates hierarchy without competing with the displayed object.
product_dna.emotional_appeal: Turns an ordinary possession into a considered vignette.
product_dna.functional_benefits: Adds height and grouping to small displays.
product_dna.decorative_benefits: Architectural step profile and controlled shadow.
product_dna.print_complexity: Moderate; broad surfaces and load stability require testing.
product_dna.material_efficiency: Hollowing may reduce mass but needs drainage and strength validation.
product_dna.future_evolution: Three-height set, photo prop pack, XL vanity riser, and commercial display kit.
product_dna.physical_manufacturing_potential: Plausible as a mineral-composite display object after load testing.

competition_opportunity.rationale: EVD-009 marks direct competitor evidence Unknown, so opportunity is provisional.

brand_alignment.rationale: EVD-009 marks market validation Unknown; a restrained plinth is strongly aligned internally.

collection_potential.rationale: EVD-004 supports a complementary display role within a jewelry and vanity collection.

resin_printability.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin testing Unknown; geometry is simple but hollowing and broad planes require prototypes.

ai_production_efficiency.rationale: EVD-009 marks production evidence Unknown; stepped forms are efficient to model parametrically.

customer_value.rationale: EVD-004 supports display organization, but the value of a dedicated riser is not directly validated.

production_simplicity.rationale: EVD-009 marks print evidence Unknown; few features reduce modeling complexity.

marketplace_fit.rationale: EVD-004 supports Etsy lifestyle fit while Cults3D-specific evidence is Unknown.

improvement_actions: Research display riser and photo prop terms
